synthesis.driver: Escalating US-Iran strikes and contested Hormuz transit push Brent higher, but oversupply curbs spikes.
synthesis.based_on: Aramco profit forecast to rise 40% despite lower volumes

takes.aramco profit forecast to rise 40 despit: Aramco's profit rise signals resilience but doesn't alter the oversupply cap on prices.
takes.seoul says no us request to deploy warsh: No US warship request suggests limited military escalation, slightly tempering price pressures.
takes.us military completes 11th night of stri: US strikes on Iran sustain war premium, driving prices higher despite glut.
takes.iran s demands over the strait of hormuz: Rubio's warning underscores Hormuz risks, reinforcing upward pressure on the war premium.
